markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on the Lovable workshop and align on Check That priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workshop Pivot:** The Lovable workshop will pivot from a technical "Shaping Loop" to a broader "Vibemarketing" narrative, framing AI as an accelerator for the company's "build in public" philosophy.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Check That Priority:** Check That is the company's P0 investment. Jason will own its organic growth strategy, focusing on operationalizing Marcel's strategic plan and developing a January launch.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [**Client Handover Strategy:** Jason will hand off Webflow/Augment accounts to Liz, not Kathy, to validate the "shared strategy" model and free up his time for Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=2868.0)

## Topics

### Check That: The P0 Investment

  - [**Urgency:** Check That is the company's top priority due to a direct competitive threat from Profound, which grew from $0 to $30M ARR and is now valued at $900M.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=2960.0)
  - [**Strategic Foundation:** Marcel's plan, detailed in a shared doc, identifies 22,000 high-potential keywords (21M monthly searches) for the initial content focus.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)
  - [**Jason's Role:** Jason will operationalize this strategy, focusing on execution and developing a January launch plan (activation, splash, growth loops).](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

### Client Account Handover Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Free Jason's time for Check That by handing off the Webflow and Augment accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [**Decision:** Liz will take over the client-facing role, not Kathy.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=2868.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This validates the "shared strategy" model, proving that a director can delegate execution to an engagement manager.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=2624.0)
      - [**Process:** Jason will prep Liz for meetings and gradually step back as Liz builds client trust.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=2833.0)
  - [**Context:** Recent issues (e.g., Liz's initial lack of context) highlight the need to enforce standard processes (e.g., using the OS) to ensure scalability and prevent inefficient rework.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)

### Lovable Workshop Strategy

  - [**Initial Concept:** A "Shaping Loop" framework for AI workflows, using the Lovable website build as a case study.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [**Pivot to Vibemarketing:** The workshop will frame AI as an accelerator for the company's "build in public" philosophy, aligning with its unique, non-traditional marketing approach.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Content Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [**Marcel:** Define Vibemarketing.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**CC:** Tell the Lovable story.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
      - [**Jason:** Detail the "Shaping Loop" process (artifacts, principles, process).](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [**Live Demo:** Walk through the Lovable website build.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [**Future Workshops:** A session with Kristen from Gamami is planned for early January.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=3121.0)
      - [Draft the Vibemarketing definition for the workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [Develop the Check That monetization plan.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=3130.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=3121.0)
      - [Operationalize the Check That organic growth strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=3047.0)
      - [Develop the Check That January launch plan.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
      - [Hand off Webflow and Augment accounts to Liz.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=2868.0)
      - [Prepare the "Shaping Loop" content for the workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/sRL44upyWzg7sZGxmy2EhsXjbMsb3XiB?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
